title: Release readiness validation config v1
description: Shape for the release-readiness validation config, with config-driven evidence keys.

validations.description: Registry of known validation keys and human descriptions.

evidence_boolean_keys.description: Top-level evidence JSON keys (smoke/e2e) that set val_map[k]=True when true. If omitted, the engine uses an empty list — set this explicitly for your project.

risk_category_to_required_validation.description: Optional map from risk category (from risk_from_paths) to required validation key. Categories not in the map fall back to identity mapping.

risk_from_paths.description: Rules mapping path patterns to risk categories.
